title: Best cities to live in Europe
source: Eurostat — Perception survey on quality of life in European cities

metrics.label: Overall livability
metrics.summary: BullDozer composite — mean percentile rank across the six dimensions below (higher = better).

metrics.label: Satisfied to live in the city
metrics.summary: Agree they are satisfied to live in their city.

metrics.label: Satisfaction with own life
metrics.summary: Satisfied with the life they lead (very + fairly).

metrics.label: Feel safe at night
metrics.summary: Agree they feel safe walking alone at night in their city.

metrics.label: Easy to find a good job
metrics.summary: Agree it is easy to find a good job in the city.

metrics.label: Affordable housing
metrics.summary: Agree it is easy to find good housing at a reasonable price.

metrics.label: People can be trusted
metrics.summary: Agree most people in the city can be trusted.
